generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While politicians debate, your local community could be unprepared for emergencies. Civil defense readiness isn't just about big budgets—it's about smart, local solutions. Let's focus on practical preparedness that keeps us all safe without sacrificing our freedoms. #CommunityFirst #SmartDefense
